title: Sichuan Food
html:
Sichuan Food

Stub. First mentioned in 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu.

The cuisine of Sichuan province (chengdu is the capital). Famous for mala (numbing-spicy), Sichuan peppercorn, hotpot, mapo tofu, twice-cooked pork, and the frog dishes Yahir tried (97 CNY for the "5th frog meal" stood out).
